design_plan: rng=42; audience=founders/operators/creators; AIDA: Attention(centered cinematic hero), Interest(real workflow), Desire(computer-use cache advantage), Action(primary CTA); hero_max_width≈1120px for 2–3 lines; bento_density: grid-auto-flow:dense present; label sweep: competitors mentioned; button contrast: black/white pills checked.
headline: AI agent to build websites — research, code, publish, and iterate with real computer use

site_brief.audience: founders, operators, and creators who want an AI agent to build and publish websites
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'AI agent to build websites', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful.
site_brief.title: AI agent to build websites
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can research, generate, push to GitHub, publish, and iterate website assets with real computer-use workflows

summary: This use‑case page answers the practical query “AI agent to build websites.” It shows founders, operators, and creators how Super can act as a personal AI agent that researches, generates, pushes to GitHub, deploys, and iterates websites using real computer control and a reusable computer-use cache. It contrasts Super with chat-first assistants and AI website builders, links the full /use-cases/ cluster, and includes concrete workflows, examples, FAQs, and sources.
